_comment: Hume Health 'For dad, by Hume' Father's Day promo card — the worked example. Copy to config.json and edit. Canvas 1080x1920 9:16, 10s. Tile types: product | photo | off | code. Real DOM text only — never AI-render the wordmark/%/code.
headline:
For dad,
by Hume.

music.prompt: Warm uplifting cinematic wellness brand bed for a Father's Day promo. Soft warm synth pads with gentle plucked melodic notes, light percussion (soft kick + subtle hi-hat), warm rounded bass. Major key, open optimistic chords, ~85 BPM. Premium DTC wellness register — modern, confident, celebratory but not pulse-pounding. Instrumental only, NO vocals. Energetic from t=0 with NO slow intro or fade-in. 10 seconds.
